snippet.title: NHL 27 Official Reveal Trailer
snippet.description:
Every team has an edge in NHL 27. Pre-order* NHL 27 to play 7 Days Early on September 4th!  
https://x.ea.com/90123

EA SPORTS™ NHL® 27 brings every NHL team's identity to life on the ice, in the arena, and through the broadcast.

Experience Authentic Atmospheres across all 32 NHL arenas with real-world goal songs, new broadcast package and updated crowds.

A refreshed broadcast package featuring John Buccigross and Darren Pang delivers new commentary, modern graphics, updated visuals, and richer storytelling for a more authentic NHL presentation.

Connected Franchise lets you create and run your own online league with up to 32 human-controlled teams, complete with customizable rules, flexible scheduling, roster management, and powerful commissioner tools.

On the ice, 32 unique Team Playbooks powered by NHL EDGE data bring authentic team identities to life. From breakouts to special teams and late-game strategy, every matchup feels more distinct, making every shift matter.

Conditions & restrictions apply. See https://www.ea.com/games/nhl/nhl-27/game-disclaimers for details.

#nhl27 #nhl27reveal

snippet.title: KATSEYE: WILD HEARTS Official Trailer
snippet.description:
KATSEYE: WILD HEARTS in cinemas worldwide with limited screenings from August 12. 
tickets now on sale at http://katseyewildheartsfilm.com/

Two-time GRAMMY®-nominated global girl group KATSEYE is coming to cinemas worldwide with a special theatrical release ahead of their third EP, WILD.

KATSEYE: WILD HEARTS is a captivating journey into the group's bold new era while celebrating the fans who helped make it possible. Featuring never-before-seen footage, EYEKONS fan videos, and intimate interviews from the group members, the film explores the powerful bond between KATSEYE and their global fandom. A love letter to the EYEKONS who helped build this movement, KATSEYE: WILD HEARTS reveals why this group's story is only just beginning.

From the intense pressure of Dream Academy to chart-topping viral success, audiences experience the highs, setbacks, sacrifices, and breakthrough moments that transformed KATSEYE on their path to global pop stardom. Praised by outlets including The New York Times, Vogue, Rolling Stone, and Billboard, KATSEYE has earned acclaim for their relentless dedication to their craft and electrifying live performances. As one of pop's most exciting emerging global acts, the group continues to solidify its place as a worldwide force.

From the same team that created Netflix’s POP STAR ACADEMY, KATSEYE: WILD HEARTS is produced by Interscope Films and Boardwalk Pictures, in partnership with HYBE X GEFFEN, and directed by Nadia Hallgren.

snippet.title: SEN vs C9 - VCT Americas Stage 2 - Week 1 Day 1
snippet.description:
Widely regarded as the most successful region in international VALORANT competition, VCT Americas is home to world-class talent, championship-winning veterans, and the latest generation of emerging stars. The region also boasts the reigning Masters London champions and the current VALORANT Champions winners.
Now, the stakes are higher than ever. Every team enters Stage 2 with one objective: secure a spot at VALORANT Champions Shanghai.
Leviatán enters Stage 2 riding high after its Masters London triumph. NRG is ready to remind the world why it has long been considered a global powerhouse. Meanwhile, G2 Esports aims to defend its VCT Americas crown and add another championship to its trophy case.
We’re proud to work with our fantastic partners throughout 2026: ExpressVPN, HP, Pulsar, Red Bull, Samsung, Secretlab, Verizon, and Zowie.

Follow the below channels to get the latest information on VCT Americas:
Twitter: x.com/valesportsna
Tik Tok: tiktok.com/@valesportsna

The official French lyric video of “Have You Ever Seen The Rain” from John Fogerty’s ‘Legacy: The Creedence Clearwater Revival Years.’

Legacy: The Creedence Clearwater Revival Years (John's Version) is available now!

Shop for exclusive vinyl and CDs and stream the album here: https://ffm.to/johnfogerty-legacy 

John Fogerty celebrates the songs that shaped rock history on his own terms. For the first time, he fully owns the rights to his iconic catalog. Legacy: the Creedence Clearwater Revival years is both a celebration and a reclamation.

These are new recordings that capture his raw energy and renewed creative fire as he approached his 80th birthday. Backed by his family band with Shane and Tyler Fogerty, John steps forward with the sound of an American original at center stage.

----
Welcome to the official YouTube page of legendary musician John Fogerty of Creedence Clearwater Revival. 

Some songs you might recognize from John's historical career are 'Proud Mary,' 'Fortunate Son,' 'Down on the Corner,' 'Centerfield,' and tons more! 

Although in his 80s, John shows no signs of slowing down, creating new music and continuing to tour the world, so be sure to tune in, subscribe, and keep on the pulse of all things John Fogerty. 

For more on John, make sure to follow him across social media at the links below:
https://www.instagram.com/johnfogerty/ 
https://www.facebook.com/johnfogerty 
https://x.com/john_fogerty

snippet.title: MARVEL Tōkon: Fighting Souls | Open Beta Trailer
snippet.description:
The MARVEL Tōkon: Fighting Souls Open Beta on PS5 and PC is almost here!

From July 24–26 PT, assemble your dream team and experience:
 - 15 playable characters, including Blade
 - 6 stages, including Marvel's New York (Night)
 - Online Lobby with Casual and Ranked Matches 
 - Local Versus Mode for offline battles
 - A fully featured Training Mode
 - Three chapters of The Amazing Guardians' Episode Mode

Don't miss your chance to jump into the Ultimate 4v4 Tag-Team Fighter before launch!
MARVEL Tōkon: Fighting Souls is coming to PS5 and PC on August 6th, 2026 PT!
